result.title: 维修厂 mall 使用有效账号登录后进入维修厂商城
维修厂 mall 登录后退出应离开已登录状态
供应商 seller 使用有效账号登录后进入供应商中心
result.error_message: [SKI313] 关键字 'evaluate' 重试 1 次后仍失败: [SKI302] JavaScript 执行失败: Page.evaluate: Error: 供应商 seller 登录成功页断言失败: currentUrl=http://ec-hwbeta.casstime.com:443/passport/login?error=e1, stillOnLogin=true, hasSellerSignal=false, hasLogout=false, text=400 Bad Request The plain HTTP request was sent to HTTPS port at eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:697) at eval (eval at evaluate (:234:30), <anonymous>:1:891) at eval (<anonymous>) at UtilityScript.evaluate (<anonymous>:234:30) at UtilityScript.<anonymous> (<anonymous>:1:44) keyword: evaluate

result.title: 供应商 seller 登录后退出应离开已登录状态
